title: The Woman Behind Your Favorite Pop Songs Just Won a Huge Award!
summary: Have you ever sung along to Sabrina Carpenter’s “Manchild” or “Tears”? What about that super catchy song “APT.” by Rosé and Bruno Mars? Well, a woman named Amy Allen helped write all of them—and she just won a huge prize! At the ASCAP Pop Music Awards in Hollywood, Amy Allen was named Songwriter of the Year. That means she wrote or co-wrote some of the most popular songs of the year. Jimmy Jam, a famous music producer, gave her the award and said, “We don’t have to worry about AI because of people like Amy Allen.” He meant that real human creativity is still the best. Another winner was Laufey (say it like “lay-vay”), who got the ASCAP Creative Voice Award. She makes music that mixes pop with classical and jazz. “I grew up loving classical, loving jazz, knowing that was the pop music of its time,” she said. “And I had this dream to make it the pop music of now, of this decade, and I really feel that has happened.” Other winners included Jack Antonoff, who worked on songs by Taylor Swift and Kendrick Lamar, and Justin Bieber, who co-wrote his own songs “Daisies” and “Yukon.” The night was all about celebrating the people who write the songs we can’t stop humming!
why_it_matters: The songs you hear and love are often created by people working behind the scenes, and their hard work deserves celebration just like the performers do.

keywords.explanation: When two or more people write a song together.
A person who oversees the recording of a song and helps it sound great.
A big group that makes sure songwriters get paid when their music is played.
Serious, old-style music with orchestras and pianos, not pop.
A type of music with strong rhythm and improvisation, popular in the 1900s.
Computer smartness that can sometimes make music or art on its own.

background_read: Songwriters are the creative minds behind many hit songs, but they are often less famous than the singers.
ASCAP, which stands for the American Society of Composers, Authors and Publishers, is one of the biggest organizations that collects money for songwriters when their music is performed.
Jimmy Jam is a legendary music producer known for his work with Janet Jackson and many other stars.
Article_Structure: WHO: Amy Allen, the songwriter behind Sabrina Carpenter's hits.
WHAT: She was named Songwriter of the Year at the ASCAP Pop Music Awards in Hollywood.
WHY: Her work proves that real human creativity is irreplaceable, even as AI technology grows.

perspectives.description: She felt honored to be recognized for her writing and to show how powerful real human stories are in music.
He believes that human creativity is unbeatable, and that AI can never replace the heart of a real songwriter.
She saw her award as proof that bringing classical and jazz into pop music could connect with a new generation.
